title: Voter ID laws are widely backed by Americans, including Hispanics
author: Alfonso Aguilar and Vincent Torres, opinion contributors
fullText: Hispanic Americans overwhelmingly support voter ID laws, which are seen as a way to protect the integrity of elections and ensure that only citizens are able to vote.
summary: Hispanic Americans overwhelmingly support voter ID laws, which are seen as a way to protect the integrity of elections and ensure that only citizens are able to vote.
